sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12198" key="a(plodi/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁπλοδίσημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (also written <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁπλοτίσ-</foreign>) dub.sens., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔργον,</foreign> apptly. of embroidery or weaving, <sense id="n12198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2132</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
